name: Dungeons and Dragons 5th Edition (2024)
description: The 5th Edition of Dungeons and Dragons using the revised 2024 rules.

filters.size: tiny, small, medium, large, huge, gargantuan

filters.abilityScores: strength, dexterity, constitution, wisdom, intelligence, charisma

filters.weaponMastery: Cleave, Graze, Nick, Push, Sap, Slow, Topple, Vex
